nodes.name: Socotra sunbird
nodes.summary: The Socotra sunbird (Chalcomitra balfouri) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Socotra. Its natural habitats are tropical dry shrubland, tropical moist shrubland, and tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Socotra sunbird (Chalcomitra balfouri) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Socotra.

nodes.name: Socotra sunbird

nodes.name: Chalcomitra
nodes.summary: Chalcomitra（Chalcomitra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Carmelite sunbird、Green-throated sunbird、Amethyst sunbird等7种鸟类。
